items.title: Chiefs announce 20 undrafted free agent signings
items.summary: The Chiefs opened their three-day rookie minicamp on Friday and they added 20 undrafted free agents to their roster as it got underway.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
